benchmark_scope.primary_release_object: Stage A biology tool-use trajectory benchmark substrate
benchmark_scope.primary_claim: Agents should be evaluated on tool -> evidence packet -> terminal action trajectories with hidden labels separated from model-visible prompts.
non_claims: No claim that RLVR alone solves scientific reasoning
No claim that oracle-derived trajectories are live model discoveries
